text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 31 

COPD 

LABEL: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease End-of-Year Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: COPD 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = Beneficiary did
